title: Baird +2 (Research Version)
description: 3 sets × 5×1min @120% FTP / 1min rest, 8min between sets — TrainerRoad's gateway VO2max workout
purpose: Short VO2max repeats with full recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.

coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/15. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 1/15. Target: 120% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Don't overshoot first 30s — settle in smoothly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First rep is always the hardest mentally. Once you're in it, commit fully. 15 intervals ahead.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 1:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 120% for 1:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.
